Bleeding is where the real world bleeds into a [[larp]]<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5f4rUgaVAp0</ref>
==References==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Bleeding]][[Category:Larping]]
[[sn:Bleeding]][[sn:Bleeding]][[sn:Bleeding]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
